CustomProperties.Name: OnCancelPressed
CustomProperties.Tooltip: Se dispara al presionar CANCEL - volver a LogFailure

CustomProperties.Name: OnConfirmPressed
CustomProperties.Tooltip: Se dispara al confirmar - leer varFaultDetail y varFaultNote
